name: Chicken Nuggets
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the chicken and cut into 1-inch chunks.
2. Place the pieces on a paper towel to dry.
3. Prepare the cracker mixture: Use about 6 each of regular salted crackers, cheese crackers, Champagne crackers, and 1 piece of dried toast. Run through the Quisnart machine until thoroughly crushed. Add seasonings and pulse the mixture (option: reduce seasoning by half and add 1 tablespoon Shake & Bake Chicken Mix).
4. Place the cracker mixture in a small bowl.
5. Melt the butter and dip each chicken piece into it, then roll completely coated in the crumb mixture.
6. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet and bake at 400°F for 10 to 12 minutes.
7. Serve with two or three sauces and French fries.
SAUCES:
1. Heat 1/4 cup liquid honey.
2. Heat any barbecue sauce.
3. Heat 1/4 cup honey and add 2 tablespoons of Heinz 57 sauce.
4. Sweet & Sour sauce: Mix together 1/8 cup brown sugar, 1/8 cup vinegar, 1/8 cup catsup, 1/8 cup orange juice, and 1 tablespoon cornstarch. Stir and heat in the microwave until thickened.
